privileged_info_summary: The image_rotation@1 task uses real Unsplash landscape photos (1000x667px aspect ratio 1.50) from two verified sources. The task requires rotating the image 15 degrees clockwise, which is correctly represented as -15 degrees in GIMP's rotation system (where positive angles rotate counterclockwise and negative angles rotate clockwise). The verifier expects the rotation to be within ±3 degrees of -15 degrees. The task timeout of 120 seconds provides approximately 4x safety margin for typical execution time (~30 seconds), and the max_steps of 10 provides comfortable margin for the estimated 8 steps required (select rotate tool, enter angle value, apply transformation). The pass threshold is 75% with 4 evaluation criteria: rotation angle accuracy, horizon alignment improvement, size preservation, and image modification detection.
